mapper.select:
SELECT M.MEM_NO, M.MEM_ID, M.STUDENT_NO, M.MEM_NAME, D.DEPT_NAME, U.UNI_NAME, M.PHONE, M.CREATE_DATE, M.STATUS FROM MEMBER M LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON M.DEPT_NO = D.DEPT_NO LEFT JOIN UNIVERSITY U ON D.UNI_NO = U.UNI_NO WHERE M.MEM_NO != 0
AND U.UNI_NO = #{uniNo}
AND ( ( M.STATUS = 'Y' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM AUTHORITIES A WHERE A.MEM_NO = M.MEM_NO AND A.AUTHORITY = 'ROLE_USER' ) ) OR M.STATUS = 'B' OR M.STATUS = 'N' )
AND
( M.MEM_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR M.MEM_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR M.STUDENT_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR M.PHONE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR M.STATUS LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
M.MEM_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
M.MEM_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
M.STUDENT_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
M.PHONE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
M.STATUS = #{keyword}
ORDER BY M.MEM_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AUTHORITIES (MEM_NO, AUTHORITY, UNI_NO) SELECT #{memNo}, #{authority}, D.UNI_NO FROM MEMBER M JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON M.DEPT_NO = D.DEPT_NO WHERE M.MEM_NO = #{memNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT M.MEM_NO, M.MEM_ID, M.STUDENT_NO, M.MEM_NAME, D.DEPT_NAME, U.UNI_NAME, M.PHONE, M.CREATE_DATE, M.STATUS FROM MEMBER M LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON M.DEPT_NO = D.DEPT_NO LEFT JOIN UNIVERSITY U ON D.UNI_NO = U.UNI_NO
M.MEM_NO != 0
AND U.UNI_NO = #{uniNo}
AND M.STATUS = 'Y' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM AUTHORITIES A WHERE A.MEM_NO = M.MEM_NO AND A.AUTHORITY = 'ROLE_USER' )
AND
( M.MEM_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR M.MEM_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR TO_CHAR(M.STUDENT_NO) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR M.PHONE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
M.MEM_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
M.MEM_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
TO_CHAR(M.STUDENT_NO) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
M.PHONE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
( M.MEM_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR M.MEM_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR TO_CHAR(M.STUDENT_NO) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR M.PHONE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY M.MEM_NO

SELECT D.DEPT_NO, D.DEPT_NAME, D.UNI_NO, U.UNI_NAME FROM DEPARTMENT D JOIN UNIVERSITY U ON D.UNI_NO = U.UNI_NO
D.UNI_NO = #{uniNo}
AND
D.DEPT_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
U.UNI_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY D.DEPT_NAME ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_DEPT.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO DEPARTMENT VALUES( #{deptNo}, #{uniNo}, #{deptName} )
mapper.select:
SELECT L.LECTURE_NO, L.DEPT_NO, U.UNI_NAME, D.DEPT_NAME, L.LECTURE_NAME, L.PROFESSOR_NAME FROM LECTURE L LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON L.DEPT_NO = D.DEPT_NO LEFT JOIN UNIVERSITY U ON D.UNI_NO = U.UNI_NO
D.UNI_NO = #{uniNo}
AND
D.DEPT_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
L.LECTURE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
L.PROFESSOR_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
( D.DEPT_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR L.LECTURE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR L.PROFESSOR_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY L.LECTURE_NO DESC

SELECT B.BOARD_NO, B.BOARD_TITLE, M.MEM_NAME AS BOARD_WRITER_NAME, B.CREATE_DATE, B.STATUS, BT.BTYPE_NAME, U.UNI_NAME FROM BOARD B LEFT JOIN UNI_BOARD_TYPE UBT ON B.UBTYPE_NO = UBT.UBTYPE_NO LEFT JOIN BOARD_TYPE BT ON UBT.BTYPE_NO = BT.BTYPE_NO LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON B.BOARD_WRITER = M.MEM_NO LEFT JOIN UNIVERSITY U ON UBT.UNI_NO = U.UNI_NO
B.STATUS = 'Y'
AND UBT.UNI_NO = #{uniNo}
AND
B.BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
M.MEM_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
BT.BTYPE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
U.UNI_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
B.status LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
( B.BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR B.BOARD_WRITER LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR BT.BTYPE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR U.UNI_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR B.STATUS LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY B.BOARD_NO DESC

SELECT u.uni_no, u.uni_name, m.mem_id, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member m JOIN department d ON m.dept_no = d.dept_no WHERE d.uni_no = u.uni_no AND d.dept_no != 0 ) AS count, u.status FROM university u LEFT JOIN department d ON u.uni_no = d.uni_no LEFT JOIN member m ON d.dept_no = m.dept_no WHERE d.dept_name = '공통교양'
AND u.uni_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND m.mem_id LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY u.uni_name
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_uni.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO university VALUES(SEQ_UNI.CURRVAL, #{uniName}, DEFAULT)
mapper.select:
SELECT R.REPORT_NO AS reportNo, CASE WHEN R.TARGET_TYPE = 'BOARD' THEN '게시글' WHEN R.TARGET_TYPE = 'REPLY' THEN '댓글' ELSE R.TARGET_TYPE END AS contentType, CASE WHEN R.TARGET_TYPE = 'BOARD' THEN BW.MEM_NAME WHEN R.TARGET_TYPE = 'REPLY' THEN RW.MEM_NAME END AS writerName, CASE WHEN R.TARGET_TYPE = 'BOARD' THEN B.CREATE_DATE WHEN R.TARGET_TYPE = 'REPLY' THEN RP.CREATE_DATE END AS contentCreateDate, RR.REASON_NAME AS reasonName, M.MEM_NAME AS reportMemName, R.CREATE_DATE AS reportDate, R.TARGET_TYPE AS targetType, R.TARGET_NO AS targetNo, CASE WHEN R.TARGET_TYPE = 'BOARD' THEN U1.UNI_NAME WHEN R.TARGET_TYPE = 'REPLY' THEN U2.UNI_NAME END AS uniName, CASE WHEN R.TARGET_TYPE = 'BOARD' THEN B.BOARD_NO WHEN R.TARGET_TYPE = 'REPLY' THEN RB.BOARD_NO END AS boardNo FROM REPORT R LEFT JOIN REPORT_REASON RR ON R.REASON_NO = RR.REASON_NO
-- 게시글 신고 LEFT JOIN BOARD B ON R.TARGET_TYPE = 'BOARD' AND R.TARGET_NO = B.BOARD_NO LEFT JOIN MEMBER BW ON B.BOARD_WRITER = BW.MEM_NO LEFT JOIN UNI_BOARD_TYPE UBT1 ON B.UBTYPE_NO = UBT1.UBTYPE_NO LEFT JOIN UNIVERSITY U1 ON UBT1.UNI_NO = U1.UNI_NO
-- 댓글 신고 LEFT JOIN REPLY RP ON R.TARGET_TYPE = 'REPLY' AND R.TARGET_NO = RP.REPLY_NO LEFT JOIN MEMBER RW ON RP.REPLY_WRITER = RW.MEM_NO LEFT JOIN BOARD RB ON RP.BOARD_NO = RB.BOARD_NO LEFT JOIN UNI_BOARD_TYPE UBT2 ON RB.UBTYPE_NO = UBT2.UBTYPE_NO LEFT JOIN UNIVERSITY U2 ON UBT2.UNI_NO = U2.UNI_NO
-- 신고자 LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON R.REPORT_MEM = M.MEM_NO
( (R.TARGET_TYPE = 'BOARD' AND UBT1.UNI_NO = #{uniNo}) OR (R.TARGET_TYPE = 'REPLY' AND UBT2.UNI_NO = #{uniNo}) )
ORDER BY R.REPORT_NO DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT R.REPORT_NO AS REPORT_NO, M.MEM_ID AS MEM_ID, RR.REASON_NAME AS REASON_NAME, R.CREATE_DATE AS CREATE_DATE FROM REPORT R JOIN MEMBER M ON R.REPORT_MEM = M.MEM_NO JOIN REPORT_REASON RR ON R.REASON_NO = RR.REASON_NO ORDER BY R.REPORT_NO DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
